message:
fix: harden runtime safety — audit-driven fixes (bd-1aan8, bd-3jspc, bd-2es1q)

- MaskedFinalizer/Cx::masked: change assert! to debug_assert! for
  INV-MASK-BOUNDED depth check. Release builds now log tracing::error!
  and saturate instead of panicking the entire runtime.
- OnceCell: replace mem::forget(guard) with guard.completed=true pattern
  in get_or_init and get_or_try_init. The InitGuard::Drop already checks
  the completed flag; using it is safer than forget if code changes.
- Remove redundant unsafe impl Send/Sync from Semaphore,
  OwnedSemaphorePermit, VirtualTcpStream, VirtualTcpListener — all
  fields are inherently Send+Sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
